Galerina GPU execution pending Phase 38 — no GPU number is shown (gpu-plan.ts is a stub).
Real GPU parallel execution via WebGPU (Deno built-in navigator.gpu).
Map: 2048 workgroups × 64 threads; 100000 real elements, 31072 zero-padded to power-of-2.
Reduce: 17 binary-tree passes with u64 carry; rawSum = 10000000000.
result = ((rawSum-1) % 1e9) + 1 — equivalent to the sequential CPU wrap algorithm.
elapsedMs = wall time incl. GPU readback; gpuDispatchMs = GPU submit+wait only.
Adapter: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 2060

units.reason: incomparable workloads — Galerina main()=runBulkTri(100000) (100k triples / 300k trit-ops); node/python/rust run nested 9-element truth-table micro-benches plus a separate 10M bulk; galerinOpsPerRun=27000 (≈27 truth-table combos ×1000) corresponds to none of these. Needs a common bulk-N trit-op path on every runtime.
